case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. SIMON C. CHOW et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOW, SIMON C. $12,750.89 PRINCIPAL, $1,275.05 INTEREST, $387.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,412.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $387.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHOW, SIMON C.

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,250.98 INTEREST, $82.50 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
